title: SCA Engine — Snyk API Real Client & Transitive Dependency Graph
description: software_composition_analysis_engine.py tracks OSS dependencies with CVE detection and license risk. TestSnykClientHTTP validates Snyk API v1 project/issue listing with 401/403/404 error handling. Gap: the Snyk client is tested but not connected to the SCA engine — Snyk findings are fetched separately from the internal SCA DB. Transitive dependency graph is stored as JSON but not queryable for blast radius analysis.
missing: Snyk → SCA sync: implement SnykImporter that fetches Snyk project issues and upserts them into software_composition_analysis_engine.db as scan findings
Transitive dependency graph query: /api/v1/sca/dependencies/{package}/graph that returns the full transitive dependency tree with CVE counts per node
SBOM ingestion: accept CycloneDX/SPDX SBOM upload and auto-populate the SCA dependency table from the SBOM component list
